action.reasoning: Observation: Test LPIPS=0.4542 but val showed ~0.26 - huge gap. param_search.py failed with empty results list. Need to diagnose the gap. Key hypotheses: 1) Background color mismatch (TripoSR renders black bg, GT might have white/transparent bg), 2) Parameters not optimal, 3) Val test had a bug. Analysis: Must systematically test background compositing (white vs black) and parameter settings on val data with proper LPIPS computation. Decision: Run comprehensive val test checking GT format, testing background colors, and searching parameters, then update predict.py with best settings and submit eval.
